summary: Apply live-order safety gates to the raw createOrderFromCart GraphQL command and update public README examples for the generated command surface.
reason: Greptile flagged that cart place was gated but graphql create-create-order-from-cart could still post to the order endpoint directly; the newer Printing Press validator also rejected stale Node-wrapper README command examples.
validated_outcome: go test ./... and Printing Press 4.12 publish validate passed locally before updating PR #773.
